page_content:
KNES498 Special Topics in Kinesiology (3 Credits)

Topics of special interest in areas not covered by regularly scheduled courses.

Prerequisite: Permission of SPHL-Kinesiology department. Repeatable to: 99 credits if content differs.

KNES600 Kinesiology in Public Health (3 Credits)

A broad introduction to public health within the context of the discipline of kinesiology, focusing on furthering the understanding of the ways kinesiology contributes toward achieving the goals of public health.
